name: Galaxy-Eyes Tachyon Primal
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>銀河眼の時源竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ギャラクシーアイズ・タキオン・プライマル</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If a Dragon Xyz Monster declares an attack: Attach this card on the field to it as material. You can only use each of the following effects of "Galaxy-Eyes Tachyon Primal" once per turn. If a Dragon Xyz Monster is on the field (Quick Effect): You can Special Summon this card from your hand to either field. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: The owner of this card adds 1 "Tachyon" Spell/Trap from their Deck to their hand.
mnst_eff: If a Dragon Xyz Monster declares an attack: Attach this card on the field to it as material. You can only use each of the following effects of "Galaxy-Eyes Tachyon Primal" once per turn. If a Dragon Xyz Monster is on the field (Quick Effect): You can Special Summon this card from your hand to either field. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: The owner of this card adds 1 "Tachyon" Spell/Trap from their Deck to their hand.
eff: If a Dragon Xyz Monster declares an attack: Attach this card on the field to it as material. You can only use each of the following effects of "Galaxy-Eyes Tachyon Primal" once per turn. If a Dragon Xyz Monster is on the field (Quick Effect): You can Special Summon this card from your hand to either field. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: The owner of this card adds 1 "Tachyon" Spell/Trap from their Deck to their hand.

action: Attaches itself from your field as Xyz Material
Adds from your opponent's Deck to your opponent's hand
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summons itself from your hand to your opponent's field
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
